ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Duration unknown. Enter timestamps manually (HH:MM:SS or MM:SS):
ast.target: 时长未知。请手动输入时间戳（HH:MM:SS 或 MM:SS）：

ast.name: confirm
ast.source: Are you sure you want to discard this interrupted operation? Completed items are kept, but remaining items will be abandoned.
ast.target: 您确定要放弃此中断的操作吗？已完成的项目将被保留，但剩余的项目将被丢弃。

ast.name: info
ast.source: Open a note first to insert the OCR result
ast.target: 请先打开一个笔记以插入 OCR 结果

ast.name: info
ast.source: Open a note first to insert the transcription
ast.target: 请先打开一个笔记以插入转录内容

ast.name: info
ast.source: Time-range clipping requires ffmpeg (desktop only). Transcribing full file.
ast.target: 时间范围裁剪需要 ffmpeg（仅限桌面端）。正在转录完整文件。

ast.name: info
ast.source: No URLs, transcriptions, or audio to summarize in this note
ast.target: 此笔记中没有可总结的 URL、转录内容或音频

ast.name: info
ast.source: No tidy to undo for this note
ast.target: 此笔记没有可撤销的整理操作

ast.name: info
ast.source: Note is in an excluded folder or has an excluded tag
ast.target: 笔记位于排除文件夹中或带有排除标签

ast.name: info
ast.source: No organize to undo for this note
ast.target: 此笔记没有可撤销的组织操作

ast.name: info
ast.source: All topics already exist in vault -- nothing to generate
ast.target: 所有主题在保险库中均已存在 — 无需生成

ast.name: info
ast.source: Note is excluded from REM scanning
ast.target: 笔记已从 REM 扫描中排除

ast.name: info
ast.target: 未找到符合条件的文件

ast.name: info
ast.source: Cannot undo — no original content snapshot
ast.target: 无法撤销 — 没有原始内容快照

ast.name: info
ast.source: No media found in this note
ast.target: 此笔记中未找到媒体文件

ast.name: info
ast.source: Checkpoint not found or already completed
ast.target: 检查点未找到或已完成

ast.name: info
ast.source: Video transcription is not available on mobile
ast.target: 移动端不支持视频转录

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Images whose base64 payload exceeds this size are automatically downscaled before being sent to the API. The Anthropic API limit is 5 MB; lower this only if your provider enforces a smaller limit.
ast.target: 超过此大小的图像的 base64 负载会在发送到 API 前自动缩小。Anthropic API 的限制是 5 MB；仅当您的提供商强制执行更小的限制时才降低此值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Notes with fewer words than this are considered stubs
ast.target: 字数少于此值的笔记将被视为存根

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Flag notes containing TODO, TBD, FIXME, PLACEHOLDER
ast.target: 标记包含 TODO、TBD、FIXME、PLACEHOLDER 的笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Flag notes with headings but no content beneath them
ast.target: 标记有标题但下方无内容的笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list of folders to skip
ast.target: 要跳过的文件夹的逗号分隔列表

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Wait this long after the last change to a note before processing it. The timer resets on every edit, so active typing or chunked sync keeps deferring — processing fires only once the note has been quiet for the full window. Raise it if notes are still arriving when they get processed.
ast.target: 在处理笔记前，等待笔记最后一次更改后这么长时间。计时器在每次编辑时重置，因此活跃的输入或分块同步会不断推迟处理——只有在笔记在完整窗口期内保持静止后才会触发处理。如果笔记在处理时仍在到达，请提高此值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder to watch for new notes. See docs/intake-folder.md for the mobile capture workflow.
ast.target: 监视新笔记的文件夹。有关移动端捕获工作流程，请参阅 docs/intake-folder.md。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Stamp `synapse-processed: true` on a note once handled so it is not reprocessed
ast.target: 处理后在笔记上标记 `synapse-processed: true`，以避免重复处理

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Fallback destination used only when auto-organize keeps a note in the intake folder (e.g. low confidence). Notes organize relocates are left where it put them. Leave blank to keep unorganized notes in the intake folder.
ast.target: 仅当自动整理将笔记保留在接收文件夹中时（例如置信度低）使用的回退目标。笔记整理后重新定位的笔记将保留在其放置的位置。留空可将未整理的笔记保留在接收文件夹中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When a note is auto-organized out of the intake folder, leave a dated breadcrumb linking to its new home in the capture-log subfolder.
ast.target: 当笔记被自动整理出接收文件夹时，在捕获日志子文件夹中留下一个带日期的面包屑，链接到其新位置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Subfolder of the intake folder for breadcrumbs (relative to it). This subfolder is ignored by the watcher so breadcrumbs are never reprocessed.
ast.target: 接收文件夹中用于面包屑的子文件夹（相对于它）。此子文件夹会被监视器忽略，因此面包屑永远不会被重新处理。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Audio language for transcription (auto-detect if empty)
ast.target: 转录的音频语言（如果为空则自动检测）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Clean up and structure transcriptions with AI
ast.target: 使用 AI 清理和结构化转录内容

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where to save downloaded video files in the vault
ast.target: 在保险库中保存下载视频文件的位置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add an embed link to the downloaded video file in the note
ast.target: 在笔记中添加指向已下载视频文件的嵌入链接

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically generate enrichment proposals after elaboration or transcription
ast.target: 在阐述或转录后自动生成丰富建议

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of metadata tags (status, type, source) to suggest per note
ast.target: 每条笔记建议的最大元数据标签数量（状态、类型、来源）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of AI-extracted topic links to suggest
ast.target: 建议的最大 AI 提取主题链接数量

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Suggest links to notes that don't exist yet (Obsidian grayed-out links)
ast.target: 建议链接到尚不存在的笔记（Obsidian 灰显链接）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of related note links to suggest
ast.target: 建议的最大相关笔记链接数量

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum external links to suggest (stingy — keep this low)
ast.target: 建议的最大外部链接数量（吝啬——保持较低）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Minimum relevance score for internal links (0-1, lower = more liberal)
ast.target: 内部链接的最低相关性分数（0-1，越低越宽松）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Define metadata tag categories. Tags classify notes (status, type, source) — topics become [[links]] instead.
ast.target: 定义元数据标签类别。标签对笔记进行分类（状态、类型、来源）——主题则成为 [[链接]]。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list of folders to skip for enrichment
ast.target: 要跳过丰富处理的文件夹的逗号分隔列表

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Notes with these tags will skip enrichment
ast.target: 带有这些标签的笔记将跳过丰富处理

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Produce a single combined transcription and summary from the selected audio files.
ast.target: 从选定的音频文件生成单一的组合转录和摘要。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically detect content type (e.g. recipes) and use a specialized summary format
ast.target: 自动检测内容类型（例如食谱）并使用专门的摘要格式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum characters of content to send to AI for summarization
ast.target: 发送给 AI 进行摘要处理的最大内容字符数

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Override the default summarization prompt (leave empty for default)
ast.target: 覆盖默认的摘要提示（留空使用默认值）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list of folders to skip for summarization
ast.target: 要跳过摘要处理的文件夹的逗号分隔列表

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Notes with these tags will skip summarization
ast.target: 带有这些标签的笔记将跳过摘要处理

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically organize the current note after summarization completes (single-note only, not vault-wide)
ast.target: 摘要完成后自动整理当前笔记（仅限单条笔记，非整个保险库）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Minimum topic confidence to propose a new folder (0.5-1.0). Higher = fewer new folders.
ast.target: 提出新文件夹的最低主题置信度（0.5-1.0）。越高 = 新文件夹越少。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list of folders to skip for organization
ast.target: 要跳过整理的文件夹的逗号分隔列表

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Notes with these tags will skip organization
ast.target: 带有这些标签的笔记将跳过整理

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How many generations of topics to explore

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Minimum quality score to continue recursing (0.1-0.9)
ast.target: 继续递归的最低质量分数（0.1-0.9）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of notes to generate in a single deep dive (10-100)
ast.target: 单次深度探索中生成的最大笔记数量（10-100）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where to create new notes. Uses a subfolder per root note. (empty = same folder as source)
ast.target: 创建新笔记的位置。每个根笔记使用一个子文件夹。（空 = 与源文件相同的文件夹）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How child notes are placed: nested under parent topic folders, flat in a single folder, or AI-organized by content semantics
ast.target: 子笔记的放置方式：嵌套在父主题文件夹下、平铺在单个文件夹中，或由 AI 按内容语义组织

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically trigger enrichment when a deep dive note is accepted
ast.target: 当深度探索笔记被接受时自动触发丰富处理

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically trigger organize when a deep dive note is accepted
ast.target: 当深度探索笔记被接受时自动触发整理

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list of folders to skip for deep dive
ast.target: 要跳过深度探索的文件夹的逗号分隔列表

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Notes with these tags will skip deep dive
ast.target: 带有这些标签的笔记将跳过深度探索

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use AI to find conceptual matches beyond literal title/alias matching
ast.target: 使用 AI 查找超越字面标题/别名匹配的概念匹配

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 语义匹配的最低置信度（0-1）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of link candidates to suggest per scanned note
ast.target: 每篇扫描笔记建议的最大链接候选数

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Which AI service to use for elaboration and post-processing
ast.target: 用于阐述和后处理的 AI 服务

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: URL for local Ollama server (HTTPS required for non-localhost)
ast.target: 本地 Ollama 服务器的 URL（非 localhost 需要 HTTPS）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Model to use for AI operations
ast.target: 用于 AI 操作的模型

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: AI 响应中的最大令牌数（256-8192）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select an audio file from your vault
ast.target: 从您的保险库中选择一个音频文件

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在 frontmatter 中标记已处理

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 将音频合并为一个摘要

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 新建文件夹置信度阈值

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Combine all selected audio into one transcription
ast.target: 将所有选定音频合并为一个转录

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 标签1, 标签2, 标签3

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Synapse] Image downscale failed; sending original bytes:
ast.target: [Synapse] 图片降采样失败；发送原始字节：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Synapse] Failed to parse topic extraction response
ast.target: [Synapse] 解析主题提取响应失败

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Synapse REM] Failed to parse semantic match response
ast.target: [Synapse REM] 解析语义匹配响应失败

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Synapse] Failed to check for incomplete checkpoints:
ast.target: [Synapse] 检查未完成检查点失败：

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Synapse: large image auto-downscaled to fit the API limit
ast.target: Synapse：大图片已自动降采样以符合 API 限制

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please select at least one item

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Unsupported URL. Please use YouTube or TikTok.
ast.target: 不支持的 URL。请使用 YouTube 或 TikTok。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please select a file or enter a URL
ast.target: 请选择一个文件或输入一个 URL

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Both start and end times are required
ast.target: 开始时间和结束时间均为必填项

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Synapse: URL transcription from intake is coming soon (#112)
ast.target: Synapse：来自入口的 URL 转录功能即将推出 (#112)

ast.name: auto-organize
ast.target: 自动整理（基于 AI 的放置）

ast.name: content
ast.source: You are an OCR assistant. Extract text from images accurately.
ast.target: 你是一个 OCR 助手。请准确地从图片中提取文本。

ast.name: content
ast.source: You are an image analysis assistant. Analyze images and provide structured descriptions. Be concise but thorough. Focus on factual observations.
ast.target: 你是一个图像分析助手。请分析图像并提供结构化的描述。保持简洁但全面。专注于事实观察。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Weight for files in the same folder
ast.target: 同一文件夹中文件的权重

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Weight for files in sibling folders
ast.target: 同级文件夹中文件的权重

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Weight for files two levels apart
ast.target: 相隔两级文件夹中文件的权重

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Weight for files in distant folders
ast.target: 远距离文件夹中文件的权重

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Weight reduction per additional folder hop
ast.target: 每增加一级文件夹跳转的权重衰减

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Floor weight — distant files are never invisible
ast.target: 最低权重——远距离文件永远不会不可见

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Automatically accept elaboration proposals as generated (appends an elaboration callout to the note).
ast.target: 自动接受生成的详细阐述提案（在笔记末尾追加一个阐述标注）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Automatically accept all suggested tags, links, references, and metadata as generated.
ast.target: 自动接受所有建议的标签、链接、引用和元数据。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Caution: moves notes. Automatically accept organize proposals, relocating notes into the proposed folders without review.
ast.target: 注意：会移动笔记。自动接受整理提案，将笔记移动到建议的文件夹中，无需审查。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Automatically accept every generated deep dive note in a run, creating all of them in the vault.
ast.target: 自动接受一次运行中生成的所有深度探索笔记，并在保险库中创建它们。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Caution: renames files. Automatically accept title proposals, renaming notes without review.
ast.target: 注意：会重命名文件。自动接受标题提案，无需审查即可重命名笔记。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Caution: rewrites note body text. Automatically insert all discovered [[wikilinks]] without review.
ast.target: 注意：会重写笔记正文。自动插入所有发现的 [[wikilinks]]，无需审查。

ast.name: description
ast.source: What kind of note this is

ast.name: flat
ast.target: 扁平结构（全部位于根子文件夹中）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 转录当前笔记中的媒体

ast.name: name
ast.source: Run all features on a directory
ast.target: 在目录上运行所有功能

ast.name: name
ast.target: 扫描保险库中的存根笔记

ast.name: name
ast.target: 扫描当前笔记以进行详细阐述

ast.name: name
ast.target: 扫描保险库以进行内容丰富

ast.name: name
ast.source: Undo last enrichment on current note
ast.target: 撤销当前笔记的最后一次内容丰富

ast.name: name
ast.source: Undo last organize on current note
ast.target: 撤销当前笔记的最后一次组织

ast.name: name
ast.source: Scan vault for notes to summarize
ast.target: 扫描保险库中需要总结的笔记

ast.name: name
ast.source: Undo last tidy on current note
ast.target: 撤销当前笔记的最后一次整理

ast.name: name
ast.source: REM: Discover links in current note
ast.target: REM：发现当前笔记中的链接

ast.name: nested
ast.target: 嵌套（每个父主题一个子文件夹）

ast.name: text
ast.source: No pending proposals. Scan your vault or enrich a note to get started.
ast.target: 没有待处理提案。扫描您的保险库或丰富一个笔记以开始。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Extract all visible text from this image. Return only the extracted text, preserving the original layout and formatting as much as possible. If no text is found, respond with "No text detected."
ast.target: 提取此图像中的所有可见文本。仅返回提取的文本，尽可能保留原始布局和格式。如果未检测到文本，请回复“未检测到文本。”

ast.name: text
ast.source: Tidy applies spelling correction and markdown formatting without changing content. No additional options.
ast.target: Tidy 会应用拼写纠正和 Markdown 格式化，但不改变内容。无额外选项。

ast.name: text
ast.source: When enabled for a proposal type, future proposals of that type are accepted automatically as generated, applied without review. Already-pending proposals are left untouched. Off by default for every type.
ast.target: 为某种提案类型启用后，未来该类型的提案将自动生成并应用，无需审核。已挂起的提案不受影响。默认情况下，所有类型均关闭此功能。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Synapse is free and open source. Support development →
ast.target: Synapse 免费且开源。支持开发 →
